title: Resolution authorizing the Honorable Mayor Caesar P. Perez to accept and sign a deed of donation for and in favor of the Municipal Government of Los Baños Two (2) units of Laptop Computers, One (1) hard disk drive and One (1) all-in-one (copy, scan, print) from the Department of Interior and Local Government (DILG) CALABARZON Region, DILG Laguna Province, for the effective implementation of the People?s Law Enforcement Board (PLEB)-Los Baños.
